title: Section 197
content: 1[2[The Corporation]] shall, for the purpose of this Act, have power to acquire and hold movable and immovable property, or any interest therein.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “A Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
